generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former counterterrorism analyst, I've seen firsthand how our current security laws leave gaps that terrorists exploit. We need to expand domestic security powers to keep up with evolving threats. The 2024 London attacks showed what happens when we're not prepared. We can't afford to wait until it's too late. #NationalSecurityFirst
